Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Set For Trial On Nov-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Off Calendar

Motion In Opposition To Defendant Stephen Hos Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SEAN P. MORIARTY of Cesari, Werner & Moriarty, Tel No. (650) 991-5126 appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Adelia G. Medel;
Deputy City Attorney TIM FAMA of the Office of the City Attorney, Tel No. (415) 554-3921 appearing for Defendant City and County of San Francisco;
Atty. MICHAEL S. MORSE of Law Office of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel No. (925) 825-9500 appearing for Defendant Steven Ho.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion In Opposition To Defendant Stephen Ho's Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement is granted. The record does not disclose substantial competent evidence showing that the settlement is in the ballpark within the meaning of Tech-Bilt, Inc. v. Woodward-Clyde & Assoc., (1985) 38 Cal.3d 488. See Mattco Forge, Inc. v. Arthur Young & Co. (1995) 38 Cal.App.4th 1337, 1350, n. 6. While Mr. Ho is paying his insurance policy limit, there is no evidence regarding his financial status. There is also insufficient evidence regarding a rough approximation of plaintiff's total recovery. CCSF is correct that plaintiff claims over $200,000 in medical bills. It also appears that Mr. Ho is mostly at fault with respect to the accident. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Continued To Apr-08-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
